steps.title: Set the function equal to 48
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=8\sqrt{x}$, and the question asks when $f(x)=48$. So solve $$8\sqrt{x}=48$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The correct answer is $36$. It checks because $8\sqrt{36}=8(6)=48$. The other choices do not make the function equal $48$.
